xeno.options.advCulling.tooltip: Optimizes occlusion culling to reduce the number of non-visible chunk sections submitted for rendering.
xeno.options.ao.subBlock.tooltip: Applies smooth ambient occlusion at the sub-block level for non-full blocks. Experimental.
xeno.options.entityCulling.tooltip: Skips rendering entities located in sections that are fully occluded from the camera view.
xeno.options.frameQueue.tooltip: Controls how many frames are processed ahead. Higher values may smooth frame pacing at the cost of increased input latency.
xeno.options.backfaceCulling.tooltip: Eliminates block faces that face away from the camera on the CPU. Significantly reduces vertex processing load on the GPU.
xeno.options.greedyMeshing.tooltip: Merges adjacent coplanar block faces of the same type into larger quads. Greatly reduces vertex count on flat terrain. Chunks must be reloaded (F3+A) after toggling.
xeno.options.gpuDrivenRenderer.tooltip: Offloads terrain section culling and indirect draw command generation to the GPU via compute shaders. Reduces CPU overhead during terrain rendering.
xeno.options.uniqueOpaqueLayer.tooltip: Consolidates solid and cutout geometry into a single render pass. Improves GPU throughput by reducing pipeline state changes.
xeno.options.wayland.tooltip: Use the Linux Wayland compositor if available. Experimental feature. Requires a restart.
xeno.options.entityBatching.tooltip: Groups entity draw calls by shader pipeline to reduce render pass creation overhead. Increases CPU memory usage per frame.
